actions.title: capital_guard_rejected should be absorbed before execution.
actions.action: Move capital backpressure into candidate scoring and sizing preflight before execution.

actions.title: sec015_overseas_stale_approval should be absorbed before execution.
actions.action: Check overseas SEC015 approval freshness before order construction and defer stale approvals to refresh queue.

actions.title: live_position_reentry_blocked should be absorbed before execution.
actions.action: Inject live position and recent-buy cooldown state into candidate generation to suppress repeated reentry signals.

actions.title: position_sizing_rejected should be absorbed before execution.
actions.action: Record min-notional, max-risk, and quantity-normalization rejects during sizing instead of order preflight.

actions.title: safety_gate_blocked should be absorbed before execution.
actions.action: Attach safety-gate outcome before execution request creation.

actions.title: sec015_stale_approval should be absorbed before execution.
actions.action: Enforce approval TTL at entry preflight so stale approvals do not reach execution.

actions.title: trade_data_entry_guard_rejected should be absorbed before execution.
actions.action: Feed trade-data entry guard rejections into candidate score penalties and observation-mode routing.

actions.title: journal_open_entry_missing_for_sell should be absorbed before execution.
actions.action: Verify open-journal existence before SELL signal creation and route misses to reconcile evidence.

actions.title: promotion_ready_shadow has negative current-epoch expectancy.
actions.action: Demote new entries to observation/probe until closed samples and expectancy recover.

actions.title: mean_reversion has negative current-epoch expectancy.
actions.action: Require reversal evidence in ranging markets and downweight weak mean-reversion candidates.

actions.title: trend_following has negative current-epoch expectancy.
actions.action: Require pullback, volume, or multi-timeframe confirmation before trend-following live sizing.

actions.title: short_term_scalping has negative current-epoch expectancy.
actions.action: Keep early-exit loss-pressure guard active and require confirmation before fast scalp entries.

actions.title: Train exit labels across actual, best-within-hold, and forward-return horizons.
actions.action: Add dual-horizon exit labels and use them as inputs for exit patience, partial profit, and trailing decisions.

actions.title: Add peak/reversal probability head for sell timing.
actions.action: Use RSI overbought, Bollinger position, SMA20 extension, volume spike, MACD cooling, local peak, and forward drawdown tags to estimate reversal risk.

actions.title: Require a recheck before non-hard early loss exits.
actions.action: For non-hard exits under one hour, require technical recheck unless stop-loss, safety, or reconciliation rules force close.

actions.title: Replace all-or-nothing profit exits with partial lock and trailing logic.
actions.action: Use partial profit lock plus ATR/chandelier trailing when peak/reversal risk rises but trend continuation is not fully broken.

actions.title: Materialize symbol-specific exit policies before changing live sell behavior.
actions.action: Feed recommendedExitPolicy into exit patience, partial-profit, trailing-stop, and non-hard loss recheck gates by symbol.

actions.title: Backfill post-exit drift labels to separate protected exits from premature exits.
actions.action: For each closed trade, train current/5d/10d/20d post-exit drift labels so the model can distinguish protected exits from premature exits.

actions.title: Convert peak/reversal tags into partial-exit gates.
actions.action: When RSI overbought, upper Bollinger, SMA20 extension, local peak, volume spike, or MACD cooling clusters appear, lock partial gains and tighten trailing.

actions.title: Keep sell timing controlled by deterministic policy labels before any LLM override.
actions.action: Use LLM only as critic/explainer for candidate sell plans; require symbol policy, peak tags, and post-exit drift labels to approve timing changes.

actions.title: Gate every strategy change through analyze, simulate, promote, and observe stages.
actions.action: Do not let agents mutate strategy thresholds directly; stage proposals with validation commands, smoke tests, and posttrade outcome checks.

actions.title: Keep autotune in sample-collection mode until the current epoch has enough closed trades.
actions.action: Do not promote sample-thin strategy changes; compare post-guard samples only after the closed-trade floor is met.

actions.title: Strategy feedback outcomes require bias review.
actions.action: Compare feedback-tagged partial-adjust and strategy-exit outcomes before restoring weak family bias.

executionLoop.objective: Collect trade quality, symbol exit timing, strategy feedback, and posttrade staging evidence.
Validate policy candidates before any runtime threshold or live-flow change.
Convert only safe runtime-config proposals into approval-required patches.
executionLoop.guardrail: No secret, launchd, live trade, reconcile apply, or protected PID mutation.

executionLoop.objective: Promote only after sample floor, positive expectancy, and safety gates pass.
executionLoop.guardrail: LLM review cannot bypass deterministic promotion gates.

executionLoop.objective: Feed realized PnL, post-exit drift, and family-bias outcomes back into the next cycle.
executionLoop.guardrail: Failures become prefilters or observation-mode downgrades, not repeated execution attempts.
